venezuelaRelief.title: Venezuela <0>inokuda</0>
venezuelaRelief.body: Kudengenyeka kwenyika kune simba kwakarova kuchamhembe kweVenezuela, kuchikuvadza Caracas neLa Guaira zvakanyanya. Mhuri dziri ikoko hadzigoni kupfuura mudambudziko iri dzega. Chipo chako chinonanga kumishandirapamwe yekubatsira iri panzvimbo, ichishandura tsitsi dzako kuva pekugara, chikafu, netariro nhasi.
venezuelaRelief.credit: Mufananidzo: vagari vachimbundirana pedyo nechivako chakawira muCaracas. (AFP via Getty Images)
venezuelaRelief.popupBody: Kudengenyeka kwenyika kune simba kwakarova kuchamhembe kweVenezuela, kuchikuvadza Caracas neLa Guaira zvakanyanya. Chipo chako chinonanga kumishandirapamwe yekubatsira iri panzvimbo, ichishandura tsitsi kuva pekugara, chikafu, netariro nhasi.
venezuelaRelief.seoDescription: Kudengenyeka kwenyika kune simba kwakarova kuchamhembe kweVenezuela. Ipa Bitcoin yakananga kumishandirapamwe yekubatsira iri panzvimbo paAgora. Hapana puratifomu, hapana muchengeti, hapana mvumo inodiwa.
venezuelaRelief.pageHowBody: Agora haichengeti mari: Bitcoin yako inonanga kubva muwallet yako kuenda kukero yemushandirapamwe wekubatsira. Hapana puratifomu inotora chikamu, hapana muchengeti anobata mari, uye hapana anoda mvumo yokupa kana kugamuchira. Mushandirapamwe wose uri pasi apa unotungamirirwa nevanhu vari kupindura kudengenyeka iri panzvimbo.

whyDifferent.title: Yakavakwa zvakasiyana.
whyDifferent.lede: Bitcoin yakananga kubva kumupi ichienda kumugamuchiri. Hapana puratifomu pakati, hapana muchengeti akabata homwe, hapana mvumo inodiwa.

block1.heading: Kusiyana neGoFundMe
block1.body: Hapana puratifomu inogona kudzivirira zvipo zvako, kukumbira kudzoserwa kwemari, kana kupedza mushandirapamwe wako pamusoro pekusawirirana kwemitemo. Hapana Stripe, hapana Visa, hapana bhanga riri pakati ringakucherekedza pakati pemushandirapamwe.

block2.heading: Kusiyana nedzimwe puratifomu ‘dzeBitcoin’
block2.body: Hapana Lightning node yepakati, muchengeti, kana LSP inogona kukundikana kana kunge offline. Mari inotsoropodzwa zvakananga paBitcoin kuenda muwallet yauno tonga. Kana {{appName}} ikanyangarika mangwana, mushandirapamwe wose unoramba uchishanda.
block2.bullet1: Hapana wallet yokuchengetedza inogona kupedzwa kana kudzivirirwa
block2.bullet2: Inotsoropodzwa pamuchina kuenda muwallet yauno tora

block3.heading: Yeruzhinji kana yakavanzika. Kusarudza ndokwako.
block3.body: Vagamuchiri vanosarudza nzira yokugamuchira inoenderana nemamiriro avo enjodzi. Vapi vanoona QR imwe chete; wallet ndiyo inosarudza pirotokori yakakodzera.
block3.publicSummary: Inoshanda muwallet yose yeBitcoin. Yokukurumidza uye inoonekwa pamuchina.
block3.privateSummary: BIP-352 silent payments. Zvipo zvinosvika pamiganhu isingabatanidziki.

sections.organizersDesc: Sarudza vagadziri venyika vanogona kuomesa zvitumbi pamufuto wenyika.

network.title: Network
network.subtitle: Tarisira kushandiswa kwedata, marelays, nemaserver ekuiswa kwemafaira.
network.reduceDataUsageDesc: YeKubatana kunoyerwa kana kwakanonoka. Mavhidhiyo haaite kutamba ega, zviratidziro zvemavhidhiyo zviri shure zvinosiyiwa, uye mifananidzo inomirira kubatwa pamberi pekutakurwa.
network.useImageProxyDesc: Inotora mhando duku dzeWebP dzemifananidzo pane masikirwo akakwana.
network.proxyApiDesc: Inofanira kutaura <0>wsrv.nl / weserv</0> API. Vanozvichengeta vega vanogona kuinongedza kuchikamu chavo.
network.uploadQualityDesc: «Compressed» inopfupisa mifananidzo mikuru ichisarudza format diki. «Original» inoisa mifananidzo sezvairi.

advanced.title: Zvepamusoro
advanced.subtitle: Mibatanidzwa yechikwama, marongero esystem, nezvimwe zvinotenderwa kuvashandisi venyanzvi.
advanced.intro: Mibatanidzwa yechikwama, marongero esystem, nezvimwe zvepamusoro.
advanced.torToggleDesc: Inobatanidza kune marelay uye inorodha media pamusoro peNetwork yeTor kuti uwane kuchengetedzeka kwakasimba. Tarisira kushanda kwakarefu uye kugumira kadiki Tor ichiri kubatanidza.
advanced.torApplyNote: Kuvhura izvi kunofambisa traffic yose kuburikidza neTor. Ichiri kubatanidza, zvimwe zvichakara hazvizorohwi (bhana inoratidzwa ichiratidza mamiriro) — hapana chinhumwa kunze kweTor. Kudzima kunodzizoresa kubatanidza kwakanga kwakagara.

language.title: Mutauro
language.subtitle: Sarudza mutauro unoshandiswa muapp yose.
language.translationNote: Shanduro dzichiri kuitwa. Mavara asina kushandurwa anozoonekwa muChirungu.

verifier.title: Musimbisi
verifier.subtitle: Iva musimbisi nokutsanangura mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe.
verifier.prompt: Tiudze matanho aunotora kusimbisa mishandirapamwe. Sanganisa ruzivo rwakawanda sezvinobvira kuti vapi vazive kuti vanogona kuvimba nokutonga kwako.
verifier.placeholder: Tsanangura mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe — kuongorora kwaunoita, humbowo hwaunoda, mautariro aunoita kusimbisa chizvarwa chemurongi, nezvimwe zvose zvinobatsira vapi kuvimba nokutonga kwako.
verifier.errorToast: Hatina kukwanisa kuchengeta chirevo chako chemusimbisi.
verifier.disclaimer: Munhu wese anogona kuva musimbisi. Chirevo chako chinoburitswa pachena kuNostr uye chinoratidzwa pachena pa profile yako. Hachipi mvumo dzakasiyana — chinongoudza vapi mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe.
verifier.loginGateBody: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti uburitse chirevo chemusimbisi.
verifier.withdrawConfirmBody: Chirevo chako che"Matiro Atinosimbisa Nawo" chichabviswa pa profile yako. Unogona kuburitsa chitsva chero nguva.

organizations.seoDescription: Pinza sangano rako mu{{appName}}, uburitse chirevo cheruzhinji chekusimbisa, uye uwane kuvimbwa nevanopa.

hero.body: Unza sangano rako mu{{appName}} uye uburitse chirevo cheruzhinji chinotsanangura mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe yaunotsigira. Hapana chikumbiro, hapana vavhure-musuwo — mukurumbira wako ndiwo unoita basa.

steps.title: Pinda mumatanho matatu
steps.lede: {{appName}} yakavakwa paNostr, saka sangano rako rinouya nehunhu hwaro pacharo. Kugadzirira kunotora maminitsi.

step1.title: Unza purofairi yako
step1.body: Pinda nepurofairi yeNostr yesangano rako — kana kuti gadzira imwe musekondi. Hunhu hwako ndehwako, hunotakurika pamapurogiramu ese eNostr, uye hahutongwi ne{{appName}}.

step2.title: Tsanangura maitiro ako
step2.body: Nyora chirevo cheruzhinji chinotsanangura mautariro aunoongorora mishandirapamwe: kuongorora kwaunoita, humbowo hwaunoda, uye maitiro aunosimbisa hunhu hwemuronga.

step3.title: Buritsa uye uwane kuvimbwa
step3.body: Chirevo chako chinoonekwa papurofairi yako uye chinoratidza vanopa kuti unotsigira mishandirapamwe yaunosimbisa. Gadziridza kana kubvisa chero nguva.

getStarted.title: Buritsa chirevo chako
getStarted.lede: Pinda nepurofairi yesangano rako kuti uburitse, ugadziridze, kana kubvisa chirevo chako chekusimbisa.

organizations.loginGateBody: Pinda nepurofairi yeNostr yesangano rako, kana kuti gadzira imwe, kuti utange. Kana wapinda, unogona kuburitsa chirevo chako chekusimbisa pano.

tutorial.title: Mashandisirwo ekusimbisa mushandirapamwe
tutorial.lede: Chirevo chako chava pachena. Heano matanho ekutsigira mushandirapamwe waunovimba nawo — zvinotora kubata kaviri chete kubva pakadhi rapi nerapi remushandirapamwe.

open.title: Vhura menyu
open.body: Pakadhi ripi neripi remushandirapamwe, baya bhatani remadhoti matatu kona yekumusoro kurudyi kwebhanga.

verify.title: Sarudza "Simbisa mushandirapamwe uyu"
verify.body: Menyu inoratidza chiito chekusimbisa — chinoonekwa chete nevatariri nevaongorori sewe.

confirm.title: Simbisa uye wapedza
confirm.body: Pupura kuti mushandirapamwe ndewechokwadi. Bheji rako rinobatana nekadhi kuti vanopa vazive kuti unowutsigira.

getStartedCard.title: Gadzirira sangano rako
getStartedCard.body: Tichakutungamirira mukugadzira profile yesangano rako, kuburitsa chirevo chako chekusimbisa, uye kusimbisa mushandirapamwe wako wekutanga.

organizers.appointDesc: Ipa muridzi mvumo yekuomesa zvitumbi pamufuto wenyika yakatarwa.
organizers.alreadyOrganizer: Muridzi uyu atova mugadziri wenyika iyoyo
organizers.adminRequiredDesc: Vatariri vechikuva chete ndivo vanogona kusarudza kana kubvisa vagadziri.

wallet.seoDescription: Chikwama cheBitcoin chenhevedzano chinobva pa nsec yako yeNostr.

loggedOut.title: Chikwama cheBitcoin
loggedOut.description: Chikwama chenhevedzano chinobva pamuviri wako weNostr. Kero itsva pakugamuchira kwoga kwoga, nhoroondo yakazara yezvinoitwa, pasina kushandiswazve kwemakero.
loggedOut.requiresNsec: Inoda kupinda nensec (kiyi yako yakavanzika yeNostr).

unsupported.title: Chikwama hachiwanike
unsupported.extension: Yekuwedzera yebrowser yako inochengeta kiyi yako yakavanzika yakaparadzaniswa, saka hatigoni kubvisa makiyi evana kuchikwama chako.
unsupported.bunker: Mubatsiri wako weakure (NIP-46 bunker) anochengeta kiyi yako yakavanzika kudivi rebunker, saka hatigoni kubvisa makiyi evana kuchikwama chako.
unsupported.other: Mhando yako yekupinda haiburitse kiyi yakavanzika inodiwa kuti tibvise chikwama chako.
unsupported.instructions: Buda wodzosera kupinda nensec yako kuti ushandise chikwama.

tx.silentDetectedTitle: Zvakaonekwa kuburikidza nokuongorora kwemubhadharo wakanyararira weBIP-352

walletLegacy.seoDescription: Garisa mari kubva muzvizvarwa zvakapfuura zvechikwama cheAgora.
walletLegacy.title: Kugarisa chikwama chekare
walletLegacy.subtitle: Sarudza chikwama chekare chawaishandisa wobvisa bharanzi yacho uchiipinza muchikwama chako chazvino.
walletLegacy.loggedOut: Pinda nemuviri wako weNostr kuti utsvake mari muzvikwama zvako zvekare.
walletLegacy.scanning: Kuongorora chikwama chebeta cheV2 kuti tiwane mari…

v2Detected.title: Mari yawanikwa muChikwama cheV2 Prelaunch Beta
v2Detected.body: Takawana <0>{{amount}}</0> pamakero echikwama chako chekare cheV2 beta. Vhura kubvisa kweV2 pazasi kuti uiendese muchikwama chako chazvino.

v2Beta.label: V2 Prelaunch Beta Wallet
v2Beta.description: Bvisa mari muchikwama cheBIP-86 chaishandisa nsec-se-seed chakatangwa BIP-39 derivation isati yaiswa.

v1Breeze.label: V1 Breeze Wallet
v1Breeze.description: Bvisa bharanzi yepa-chain kubva paLightning custody yekare.

doubleTweak.label: Kugadzirisa SP yeDouble-tweak
doubleTweak.description: Garisa mibhadharo yakanyararira yakasara nokuda kwebug yekutumira yekare uye uitumire zvakare muchikwama chako.

walletLegacy.footnote: Sarudzo yega yega ndeyokubvisa kekamwe chete uchiisa muchikwama chako chazvino. Chikwama chekare pacho hachidzosererwi — mari yaiva mukati ndiyo chete inogariswa.

walletRecovery.seoDescription: Garisa mari kubva muchikwama chekare cheLightning uye uitumira kukero yako yeBitcoin yakabva paNostr.
walletRecovery.title: Garisa chikwama chekare
walletRecovery.heading: Garisa chikwama chako chekare
walletRecovery.subheading: Kana iwe wakambova nemari muchikwama cheLightning, unogona kuibvisa wese uchiitumira kukero yako yeBitcoin yakabva paNostr. Chikwama chako chekare hachidzosererwi — uku kutumira kwekamwe chete uye nzira imwe.

loggedOut.title: Pinda kuti ugarise
loggedOut.description: Pinda nemuviri weNostr waiva mwene wechikwama chekare cheLightning kuti mari ibviswe ichiendeswa kukero yacho yeBitcoin.

phrase.title: Mutsara wekugarisa
phrase.description: Isa mutsara wekugarisa wemashoko gumi nemaviri kubva muchikwama chako chekare.
phrase.checkingRelays: Kutarisa marelays ako kuti tiwane backup yakavharirwa nekiyi…
phrase.backupFoundDesc: Takawana backup yakavharirwa nekiyi yemutsara wekugarisa wechikwama chako chekare yakatumirwa kubva paakaundi ino.
phrase.warning: Isa chete mutsara wekugarisa wamunovimba nawo. Ani naani anewo mutsara uyu anogona kushandisa mari. Kutumira kana kwapera, idzima panzvimbo dzese pawakaikopa.

sweeping.dontClose: Usavhare tabhu ino. Izvi zvinogona kutora kanosvika neminiti chikwama chekare chichiita synchronization uye zvinoitwa zvichitumirwa.

errors.noNip44: Musainiri wako haatsigire kuvhura kweNIP-44 kunodiwa kuverenga backup yerelay. Isa zvako mutsara wekugarisa wemashoko gumi nemaviri nemaoko.
errors.decryptFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kuvhura backup yerelay. Isa zvako mutsara wekugarisa wemashoko gumi nemaviri nemaoko.
errors.invalidWordCount: Mutsara wekugarisa unofanira kuva nemashoko gumi nemaviri kana makumi maviri nemana.
errors.noBalance: Chikwama chako chekare hachina bharanzi inogona kushandiswa. Hapana chinhu chekuti chigariswe.

toast.backupLoadedDesc: Mutsara wekugarisa wakavhurwa kubva pamarelays ako.

walletBackup.heading: Mutsara weseed wechikwama
walletBackup.dialogDescription: Unogona kupinda muchikwama chako cheAgora muchikwama chipi nechipi cheBitcoin nokupinza backup iyi yemashoko makumi maviri nemana.
walletBackup.hidden: Dzvanya kuti uone mutsara weseed wemashoko makumi maviri nemana wako.
walletBackup.warning: Munhu wose anenge ane mashoko aya anogona kushandisa Bitcoin yako. Usaagovere kana wani, usaanyore pawebhusaiti, usaachengete sezvinyorwa zvakajeka kunze kwemanager wepassword.

walletMigrate.seoDescription: Tora mari kubva muchikwama chekare cheAgora (nsec-se-seed) uchiipinza muchikwama chitsva cheBIP-39.
walletMigrate.title: Tamisira chikwama chekare
walletMigrate.heading: Tamisira kuchikwama chako chitsva
walletMigrate.subheading: Chikwama cheBitcoin cheAgora ikozvino chinoshandisa mutsara weseed weBIP-39 saka chinopinda muchikwama chipi nechipi. Mari yepamakero ako ekare ichiri yakachengetedzeka — peji rino rinoitora richiipinza muchikwama chako chitsva mukuita kumwe chete.
walletMigrate.warning: Izvi zvinovaka chiitiko chimwe chete chinotora UTXO yega yega yechikwama chako chekare uye chinotumira mari yose (kupfuura muripo mudiki wenetwork) kukero yekutanga yokugamuchira yechikwama chako chitsva. Kana zvaparadzirwa, kutamisira kwapera, hazvigoni kudzosererwa.

loggedOut.title: Pinda kuti utamisire
loggedOut.description: Pinda nemuviri weNostr unobata chikwama chekare kuti mari igone kutorwa ichiendeswa kukero yako itsva.

unsupported.title: Chikwama hachiwanike
unsupported.description: Kutamisira kunoshanda chete nokupinda kwensec, nokuti makiyi echikwama chekare aibviswa zvakananga kubva pansec yako. Kupinda kwekuwedzera kwebrowser nokwemusainiri wekure hakugoni kuita kutamisira uku.

noBlockbook.title: Blockbook haina kuiswa
noBlockbook.description: Kutamisira kunoda URL yemuongorori weBlockbook kuti ionorore makero ako ekare uye iparadzire chiitiko chokutora.

noFunds.title: Hapana chokutamisira
noFunds.description: Chikwama chako chekare hachina bharanzi inogona kushandiswa. Zvose zviri muchikwama chako chitsva kare.

detected.title: Mari iri muchikwama chako chekare
detected.description: Mari iyi ichatamiswa kuchikwama chako chitsva mukuita kumwe chete.

destination.title: Kwainoenda

progress.dontClose: Usavhare tab ino panguva yokuti kutora kuchiri kuitwa.

success.title: Kutamisira kwapera
success.sent: Yatumira {{sats}} sats kuchikwama chako chitsva ({{fee}} sats muripo).

errors.noV1Account: Hatina kukwanisa kuwana makiyi echikwama chekare.
errors.noDestination: Chikwama chako chitsva hachisati chine kero yokugamuchira. Mirira kuti peji rechikwama riloade woedza zvakare.
errors.noBlockbook: Muongorori weBlockbook haana kuiswa. Kutamisira hakugoni kuongorora makero ako ekare.
errors.noFunds: Hapana mari inogona kushandiswa yakawanikwa pamakero ekare.

errors.enterRecipient: Isa kero yeBitcoin kana kero yemubhadharo wakanyararira ye-sp1….
errors.noSpendable: Hapana Bitcoin inogona kushandiswa muchikwama ichi.
errors.insufficient: Bitcoin haina kukwana pahuwandu uhwu + muripo wenetwork.

broadcastError.feeTooLowBodyWithMin: Network yeBitcoin iri kuramba muripo uyu. Muripo mudikidiki parizvino unenge {{min}} sat/vB.
broadcastError.feeTooLowBody: Network yeBitcoin iri kuramba muripo uyu. Sarudza mutsara unokurumidza kana usimudze mutengo wako wakasarudzwa.
broadcastError.rbfBody: Chinoitwa chinotsiva chinofanira kubhadhara kupfuura chekutanga. Simudza muripo wozoedza zvakare.
broadcastError.mempoolFullBody: Mempool yakazara uye muripo wako haukwanisi kupikisana. Simudza muripo kuti upinde.
broadcastError.mempoolConflictBody: Imwe yezvinopinda yatoshandiswa kana iri kushandiswa nechimwe chinoitwa.
broadcastError.tooLongChainBody: Une cheni refu yezvinoitwa zvisina kusimbiswa. Mirira chimwe chisimbiswe wozoedza zvakare.
broadcastError.badInputsBody: Network yaramba chinoitwa ichi. Chinja huwandu kana mugamuchiri wozoedza zvakare.
broadcastError.absurdlyHighFeeBody: Muripo wakatariswa wakakwirira nenzira inonetsa. Loadha mitengo yemiripo zvakare wozoedza.

scanError.title: Hatina kukwanisa kuverenga kodhi yeQR iyoyo
scanError.description: Yakanga yakatarisirwa kero yeBitcoin, kero yemubhadharo wakanyararira (sp1…), kana bitcoin: URI.

reuse.historyWarning: Kero iyi yatoshandiswa pacheni. Kutumira mari yako yakavanzika pano kunoibatanidza nenhoroondo yayo iripo yekutengeserana uye kunopedza kuvanzika kwemibhadharo yako yekunyararira. Shandisa kero yekubhadhara kunyararira (sp1…) panzvimbo yacho, kana kutumira zvakadaro.
reuse.ownPublicWarning: Iyi ndiyo kero yechikwama chako pachako chepachena. Kutumira mari yako yakavanzika kwairi kunobatanidza zvikwama zviviri uye kuzvibatanidza pamwe. Shandisa kero yekubhadhara kunyararira (sp1…) panzvimbo yacho, kana kutumira zvakadaro.

walletSend.ownSilentPaymentBlocked: Iyi ndiyo kero yako pachako yekubhadhara kunyararira. Haukwanisi kutumira uchibva muchikwama chako chepachena uchienda kuchikwama chako chakavanzika — kuita izvozvo kunosanganisa mari yako yakavanzika yekubhadhara kunyararira nemakoini akatoonekwa pacheni yepachena, zvichibatanidza chikwama chako chakavanzika kune chiziviso chinozivikanwa uye zvichiparadza kuvanzika kwacho. Tumira kune imwe kero panzvimbo yacho.

errors.denied: Mvumo yekamera yakarambwa. Ibvumire mukurongedza kwako kuti uskene makodhi eQR.
errors.busy: Imwe app iri kushandisa kamera. Ivhare wozoedza zvakare.
errors.didntStart: Kamera haina kutanga. Imwe app inogona kunge iri kuishandisa, kana browser yako yakanga yavhara skena.

bitcoinPublic.lead: Mari yaunotumira inozivikanwa nemunhu wese uye inogona kudzokerwa kwauri.
bitcoinPublic.body: Bitcoin ibhuku reanozivikanwa nemunhu wese. Zvinoitwa zvaunotumira zvinogona kudzokerwa kwauri nekusingaperi, kunyangwe zvachinjwa nevanhu vakawanda. Tumira chete kune avo vaunoda kutsigira pachena.
bitcoinPublic.bodyWithCashOut: Bitcoin ibhuku reanozivikanwa nemunhu wese. Zvinoitwa zvaunotumira zvinogona kudzokerwa kwauri nekusingaperi, kunyangwe zvachinjwa nevanhu vakawanda. Tumira chete kune avo vaunoda kutsigira pachena, kana ushandure kumari yenyika paexchange.
bitcoinPublic.iUnderstand: Ndinonzwisisa kuti chinoitwa ichi chinozivikanwa nemunhu wese.

key.extensionBody: Wapinda uchishandisa extension yebrowser (NIP-07). Kiyi yako yakavanzika yakachengetwa ipapo — itarisire kana uitumire kuburikidza neextension iyoyo.
key.bunkerBody: Wapinda uchishandisa remote signer (NIP-46). Kiyi yako yakavanzika yakachengetwa ne signer iyoyo uye haigone kutumirwa kubva mu{{appName}}.
key.explainer: Kiyi yakavanzika iyi inotonga akaundi yako pa{{appName}} uye inopa seed kuchikwama chako cheBitcoin. Munhu wose anenge anayo anogona kunyora seunge ndiwe UYE kushandisa Bitcoin yako. Ichengetedze mumanager wepassword kana kuchimwe chinhambo iwe woga zvauri kugona kuwana. Kana uchida kupinza chikwama cheBitcoin mune imwe app, shandisa mutsara weseed pazasi — wakachengetedzeka zvirinani pakugovera, unotonga chete chikwama, uye haukwanise kushandiswa kuita seunge ndiwe.
key.warning: USAMBOpasanise kiyi yako yakavanzika kune chero munhu. Dzivirira kutora screenshot yayo kana kunamatira pamwe pose kunze kwemanager wepassword. Kana yagoverwa, vamwe vachakwanisa kuwana akaundi yako.

howItWorks.title: Matanho matatu. Hapana mumiriri.
howItWorks.lede: Hapana mabanga, hapana miganhu, hapana mvumo.

step1.imageAlt: Kiyi yecryptographic yakapenya yeorange iri kuyangarara munzvimbo yerima, ichireva kuzvitonga
step1.title: Vagamuchiri vanonyora mukati memamiriro ekunze.
step1.body: Hapana bhanga. Hapana mapepa. Hapana kubvumirwa. Pakarepo kana mugamuchiri akaita akaundi pa{{appName}}, anenge ane kero yeBitcoin yakagadzirira kugamuchira rutsigiro, chero kupi munyika.

step2.imageAlt: Mari yeBitcoin yakapenya iri kubhururuka mumhepo nepamepe rerima renyika, ichireva mubhadharo wokukurumidza wepasi rose
step2.title: Vapi vanotumira Bitcoin zvakananga.
step2.body: Vapi vanotumira Bitcoin kubva mukati memawore chero ipi yavanoshandisa (Cash App, Coinbase, Strike, hardware wallet) zvakananga kumugamuchiri. {{appName}} haitombobati mari. Hapana seva pakati, hapana muchengeti.

step3.imageAlt: Ruoko rwakavhurwa rwune chiedza chinodziya cheorange chichipenya kubva mukati medziva ruoko, chichireva kugamuchira nesimba
step3.title: Rutsigiro runomira pakakosha.
step3.body: Mari inosvika kumugamuchiri zvakananga. Vanochengeta umiriri, vanochengeta kutonga. Famba nayo, chinjana, kana kushandisa; magwaro ari pasi anotsanangura maitiro okuita zvakavanzika uye zvakachengeteka.

twoWays.title: Nzira mbiri dzokubhadharwa.
twoWays.lede: Zvisarudzo zviviri zviri Bitcoin. Musiyano ndowekuti chii chaunoshandura nezvakavanzika. Apo mugamuchiri anogadzira mushando, anosarudza zvinopiwa zvinogamuchirwa. Kana iri yose, peji yokupa inoratidza QR imwe inoshanda neyose wallet.

public.title: Inoshanda neyose wallet pasi rose.
public.description: Zvipo zvinosvika kukero yeBitcoin yakajairika iyo mugamuchiri anotonga. Munhu wose ane wallet yeBitcoin anogona kutumira. Hapana app itsva, hapana akaundi itsva, hapana muraira wokudzidza.
public.bullet1: Inoshanda muwallet yose yeBitcoin: Cash App, Coinbase, Strike, hardware
public.bullet2: Kutsoropodza kunokurumidza zvikuru: zvichangotokyrigwa neBitcoin chete
public.bullet3: Inogonzwa kushandiswa pamuchina: munhu wose anogona kuona zvinhu zvakagamuchirwa nemugamuchiri
public.tradeoffIntro: Chero chipo chiri pacheni cheBitcoin uye paNostr. {{appName}} inokurudzirwa chete makambeni epachena. Kana iwe kana vapi vako vachida zvakavanzika zvikuru, kusanganisira kubva kuvashori vehurumende, verenga <0>Gwaro romupi</0> ne<1>Gwaro romugamuchiri</1> usati wapinda.

silent.title: Isingabatanidziki, pamuchina, zvakananga.
silent.description: Zvipo zvinotumirwa sezvikamu zvakanyarara zveBIP-352. Chimwe nechimwe chinosvika pamuchina mutsva, usingabatanidziki, zvekuti munhu anotarisa pamuchina haakwanise kuzvibatanidza kumushando.
silent.bullet1: Mhare yezvipo haigone kuvakwa zvakare pamuchina
silent.bullet3: Inochengetwa muhuwandu hwakavanzika hwakaparadzana, isingatombosanganiswi nemari yeruzhinji
silent.tradeoffIntro: Nzira yakavanzika zvikuru yokugamuchira Bitcoin pamuchina, asi nharaunda yangu nhasi ichiri mudiki uye isina kunyatsoenzaniswa:

noCustody.title: Hapana kuchengetedza. Hapana mumiriri.
noCustody.body: {{appName}} haichengete mari. Zvipo zvinofamba kubva muwallet kuenda muwallet paBitcoin. Hapana seva inomira pakati pemupi nemugamuchiri pachisarudzo chero chipi. Kana {{appName}} ikanyangarika mangwana, mushando wose unoramba uchishanda.

gofundme.heading: Kusiyana neGoFundMe
gofundme.body: Hapana puratifomu ingadzivirira zvipo zvako, kukumbira kudzoserwa, kana kupedza mushando wako pamusoro pekusawirirana kwemitemo.

givesendgo.heading: Kusiyana neGiveSendGo
givesendgo.body: Hapana mutsigiri wokubhadhara ari pakati, saka hapana Stripe, hapana Visa, hapana bhanga ringakucherekedza pakati pemushando.

otherBitcoin.heading: Kusiyana nedzimwe puratifomu 'Bitcoin'

what-is-ditto.question: Chii chinonzi {{appName}}?
answer: {{appName}} ipuratifomu yekutumira zvipo zveBitcoin — pachena kana zvakavanzika — zvakananga kuvagamuchiri. Hapana mukuvadzi wepakati, hapana mubati wemari, uye hapana akaundi rinogona kurambidzwa.
{{appName}} yakavakwa pamusoro peNostr, saka hunhu hwako hahubatani nehurongwa hweno — iwe une humambo hwacho.

cost-to-use.question: Ko {{appName}} ine mutengo here?
answer: **Aiwa.** {{appName}} haitori mari yepuratifomu. Paunopa chipo, unobhadhara chete mari yenetiweki yeBitcoin inoenda kuvachera — kwete kwatiri.

who-made-this.question: Ndiani akagadzira {{appName}}?
answer: {{appName}} yakavakwa ne[Soapbox](https://soapbox.pub), boka rakavhura kodhi rinogadzira maturusi enzvimbo yeNostr, vachishanda pamwe ne[World Liberty Congress](https://worldlibertycongress.org/).

send-bitcoin-onchain.question: Kutumira Bitcoin kunoshanda sei?
answer: Apo mugamuchiri anogadzira kambeni, anosarudza mhando dzemubhadharo dzaanozogamuchira: **pachena**, **zvakavanzika**, kana **zvese**.
Zvipo **zvepachena** chaizvo Bitcoin pa-chain. Zvinopedzwa pabhirochaina yepachena, zvinoshanda mu walleti yose yeBitcoin, uye zvinooneka kunemumwe nemumwe.

Zvipo **zvakavanzika** zvinoshandisa **mubhadharo wakanyarara** (BIP-352). Zvinopedzwa pa-chain zvakare, asi chibvumirano hachikwanise kubatanidzwa kudzokera kuchidimbu chechipo chemugamuchiri — saka hazvionekwe muzvinyorwa zvevapi zvepachena uye zvionekwa zvepachena. Mupi anoda walleti inotsigira mibhadharo yakanyarara — tinokurudzira [Ditto Wallet](https://ditto.pub) kana [Dana](https://github.com/cygnet3/dana/releases/download/v0.7.4/app-live-release.apk).

Apo kambeni inogamuchira **zvese**, {{appName}} inoratidza imwe kodhi yeQR ine zvinyorwa zvese zviri zviviri. MaWalleti emibhadharo yakanyarara anozviverenga sezvakavanzika; mamwe maWalleti anodzokera kukero yepachena. Vapi havatare kusarudza — walleti yavo inotora nzira yakakodzera ichizvichaira.
Pari pose, mubhadharo unoenda zvakananga kumugamuchiri. {{appName}} haina kana nguva imwe inobata mari iyi.

connect-wallet.question: Walleti iri pa{{appName}} chii?
answer: Walleti yako ye{{appName}} iwalleti yeBitcoin **inozvichengeta** (self-custodial), yakavakwa kubva kukiyi yako yeNostr. {{appName}} haina kana nguva imwe inobata mari yako — walleti inomhanya mubrowser mako uye inosaina mishando ipapo nekiyi yaunozvidzora wega. Inogona kugashira Bitcoin nenzira mbiri — sekero yepachena inogona kubhadharwa newalleti yeBitcoin ipi zvayo, uye sekodhi yemibhadharo yakanyarara inogona kubhadharwa newalleti dzinokwanisa muchivande. Hapana chinonyoreswa; inovapo nguva yaunenge wave neakaundi.

Walleti ine matabu maviri: **Pachena** (kero yako yeBitcoin yakajairika) ne**Yakavanzika** (mibhadharo yakanyarara). Huwandu huviri uhu hunochengetwa hwakaparadzana zvachose uye hahungatombo shandiswi pamwechete — kuparadzana ikoko ndiko kunochengeta zvipo zvakavanzika zvisingabatanidziki pa-chain. Paunogadzira kambeni, unosarudza kuti unogamuchira mibhadharo yepachena, yakavanzika, kana zvese. Kuti ushandise zvawagamuchira, ona **Bhuku reMugamuchiri**.

Unogonawo kubudisa mutsara weseed wemazwi makumi maviri nemana wewalleti yako wougopinza muwalleti yeBitcoin ipi zvayo yakajairika — ona "Ndinogona kubudisa walleti yangu ye{{appName}} ndichiipinza mune imwe walleti yeBitcoin here?" pazasi.

export-wallet.question: Ndinogona kubudisa walleti yangu ye{{appName}} ndichiipinza mune imwe walleti yeBitcoin here?
answer: Hongu. Walleti yako ye{{appName}} inozvichengeta zvizere. {{appName}} haina kana nguva imwe inobata Bitcoin yako uye haione makiyi ako — walleti inomhanya zvachose mubrowser mako, ichisaina mishando ipapo nekiyi inotorwa kubva kukiyi yako yakavanzika yeNostr (nsec).

Vhura walleti uchibva mumenyu, baya menyu yematombo matatu kumusoro kurudyi, wosarudza **Chengetedza chikwama**. Uchaona mutsara weseed weBIP-39 wemazwi makumi maviri nemana. Anyora pane imwe nzvimbo yakachengetedzeka (kana kuanochengeta mu password manager) — **chero ani anenge aine mazwi aya anogona kushandisa Bitcoin yako.**

Unogona kupinza mazwi makumi maviri nemana iwayo muwalleti yeBitcoin ipi zvayo yakajairika: **Sparrow**, **Electrum**, **BlueWallet**, **Phoenix**, **Trezor**, kana **Ledger**. {{appName}} inoshandisa nzira dzakajairika dzekutora — BIP-86 (Taproot) neBIP-352 (mibhadharo yakanyarara) — saka hapana kumisikidza kwakasarudzika kunodikanwa.
Mushure mekupinza, walleti iyo imwe inoratidza bharanzi nenhoroondo zvakafanana newalleti yako ye{{appName}} — iwalleti imwechete, kungoti maonero maviri ayo.

Kubudisa mutsara weseed kunowanikwa chete kana wakapinda uchishandisa nsec. Kupinda kwekuwedzera kwebrowser nokwemusainiri wekure (bunker) kunochengeta kiyi yako yakavanzika yakaparadzaniswa, saka {{appName}} haigone kutora seed munzira idzodzo.

donations-are-public-general.question: Ko zvipo paAgora zvinoonekwa nemunhu wese here?
answer: Zvinoenderana nemhando yemubhadharo yamugamuchiri anogamuchira.
**Zvipo zvepachena** zvinonyorwa pabhirochaina yeBitcoin uye paNostr. Munhu wese anogona kuona huwandu, nguva, uye makero.

**Zvipo zvakavanzika** zvinoshandisa mibhadharo yakanyarara. Hazvigone kubatanidzwa pachena kuchidimbu chechipo chemugamuchiri, hazvioneki muzvinyorwa zvevapi, uye hazviverengwe muzvionekwa zvepachena.

Apo kambeni inogamuchira zvese, walleti yemupi inosarudza nzira yekushandisa — maWalleti anokwanisa mibhadharo yakanyarara anobhadhara muchivande, mamwe anobhadhara kero yepachena. Verenga **Bhuku reMupi** ne**Bhuku reMugamuchiri** kuti uone mufananidzo wakazara.

why-donations-pending.question: Sei zvimwe zvipo zvichiti "pending"?
answer: Chipo che**pending** iBitcoin chaiyo yatotumirwa — chiri kungomirira kusimbiswa nenetiweki. Walleti yemupi yakaparadzira chibvumirano, asi hachisati chabatanidzwa mubhirochaina.

Bitcoin inoburitsa bhirochaina itsva pamwe chete maminitsi gumi oga oga, uye vacheri vanosarudza zvibvumirano zvichienderana nemubhadharo wakabhadharwa nemupi. Zvipo zvakawanda zvinosimbiswa muawa imwe; zvine fee diki zvinogona kutora nguva refu apo netiweki yakabatikana. {{appName}} inocheka zvakare mamiriro ekusimbiswa ichizvichaira, saka chiratidzo che**pending** chinonyangarika choga kana bhirochaina yauya.

Mari iri munzira — mugamuchiri achaona chipo chichiverengwa muhuwandu hwekambeni kanongochisimbiswa. Hapana chimwe chinogona kuitwa nemugamuchiri kana {{appName}} kuti vamhanyise zvinhu; walleti yemupi chete ndiyo inogona kuwedzera fee.

censorship-resistance.question: "Kushinga kucensorship" pano kunorevei?
answer: Hapana kambani inomira pakati pemupi nemugamuchiri. {{appName}} haichengete mari uye haigone kurambidza kero.
Kana netiweki yeBitcoin ichishanda, zvipo zvinogona kutumirwa uye kugamuchirwa. Kunyange {{appName}} pachayo kana ikamisikidzwa, hazvigone kuzvimisa.

why-onchain.question: Sei Bitcoin?
answer: Bitcoin ndiyo nzira yemubhadharo inotsigirwa zvakanyanya uye yakashinga kucensorship pasi rose. Walleti yose yeBitcoin inogona kuitumira.

Pa{{appName}}, vagamuchiri vanosarudza nzira yokugamuchira: **pachena** (kero yeBitcoin yakajairika) yekusvika kwakanyanya, **zvakavanzika** (mibhadharo yakanyarara) yezvipo zvisingatevedzeke, kana **zvese** kuitira kuti walleti yemupi mumwe nemumwe isarudze nzira yakakodzera zvakazvimirira. Vapi vane chete app yeBitcoin yemumusha vanogona kupawo; vapi vane walleti yemibhadharo yakanyarara vanogashira hukama hwakavanzika sezvakajairika.
Chiri kunopikiswa ndechokuti zvibvumirano zveBitcoin zvepachena zvinooneka pabhirochaina uye zvinobhadhara mari kuvachera. Bhuku reMupi nereMugamuchiri zvinotsanangura nzira yokubata zvese.

why-not-silent-payments.question: Ko {{appName}} inotsigira mibhadharo yakanyarara here?
answer: Hongu — kumativi ese ari maviri. Walleti yeBitcoin yakavakirwa mukati me{{appName}} inotsigira BIP-352, saka paunotumira Bitcoin kubva muwalleti yako ye{{appName}} unogona kubhadhara kero yemubhadharo wakanyarara (`sp1…`) zvakananga. Uye apo mugamuchiri anogadzira kambeni, anogona kugamuchira mibhadharo yakanyarara pamwe chete, kana panzvimbo, yemibhadharo yepachena yeBitcoin.

Zvipo zvemibhadharo yakanyarara zvichiri kupedzwa pa-chain, asi chibvumirano hachikwanise kubatanidzwa kudzokera kuchidimbu chechipo chemugamuchiri — saka hazvioneke muzvinyorwa zvevapi kana zvionekwa zvepachena.

Kutumira mubhadharo wakanyarara kubva kunze kwe{{appName}} kunoda walleti inotsigira BIP-352. Mamwe app emumusha haasati achitsigira, asi [Ditto Wallet](https://ditto.pub) ne[Dana](https://github.com/cygnet3/dana/releases/download/v0.7.4/app-live-release.apk) zvinotsigira.

Apo kambeni inogamuchira mhando dzese mbiri dzemubhadharo, {{appName}} inozvinyora mukodhi imwe yeQR. MaWalleti anokwanisa mibhadharo yakanyarara anobhadhara muchivande; mamwe ese anobhadhara kero yepachena. Hapana mupi anosiyiwa, uye hapana mugamuchiri anomanikidzwa kusarudza pakati pekusvika nekuvanzika.

why-not-lightning.question: Sei {{appName}} isingashandisi Lightning?
answer: Lightning inoda walleti yeLightning. Iri nyore (Wallet of Satoshi, Strike, Breez) **dzinochengetwa (custodial)** — kambani ndiyo inobata mari uye inogona kuvharwa, kuvharwa nenzvimbo, kana kumanikidzwa kurambidza maakaundi. Lightning isingachengetwe yakaoma munyaya yetekinoroji uye haina kuvimbika kuvanhu vatsva.
Tinoda {{appName}} ishande kune ane chete ruzivo rweBitcoin app yemumusha yakaita seCash App, Coinbase, Strike, Venmo, kana PayPal. Bitcoin on-chain inoshanda nemawalleti ese pasi rose.

why-not-rotating-addresses.question: Sei {{appName}} isina kugadzira kero itsva pachipo chega chega?
answer: Kuita izvi kungada {{appName}} ishande semuchina wepakati wekutsinhanisa mari — yotanga kuchengeta Bitcoin uye kuyitakurira kumugamuchiri.
Izvi zvingatiita vakatumira mari, vari pasi pemitemo inouya pamwe chete naizvozvo, uye nzvimbo imwe yokukundikana: vhara seva ye{{appName}} ndokuvhara chipo chega chega chinopfuura nemo.

Pachinzvimbo chacho, kero yechipo yemumwe nemumwe inotorwa kubva kukiyi yake yakavanzika yeNostr (nsec) — kiyi imwechete yaunoshandisa kupinda. Vapi vanotumira zvakananga kumugamuchiri, {{appName}} haina kana kubata mari, uye puratifomu pachayo haigone kuvharwa kurambidza chero ani zvake. Vagamuchiri vanoda kuvanzika kwechipo chega chega vanogona kugamuchira mibhadharo yakanyarara, inopa kusabatanidzika kumwechete pasina munhu anobata mari pakati.

why-not-other-crypto.question: Sei kusiri Monero kana imwe cryptocurrency?
answer: Bitcoin ndiyo cryptocurrency inozivikanwa zvakanyanya. Izvi zvinoreva kuti iri nyore kuvapi kutenga uye kutumira, uye iri nyore kuvagamuchiri kugashira, kuchengeta, uye kushandisa.

Macoin akatarisana nekuvanzika kwakaita seMonero anopa kupokana kwakavanzika kwakasiyana neBitcoin, asi haatsigirwe nemamwe app emumusha uye akaoma kushandurira kumari yenyika. Kukumbira kumwe kwemativi maviri echipo kuti chitange chawana cryptocurrency isingazivikanwe imhura iyo {{appName}} haisi kuzoisa panzira. Kuzvipo zveBitcoin pachezvazvo, mibhadharo yakanyarara inovharidzira nyaya yekusabatanidzika pasina kubuda muhupfumi hweBitcoin.

what-is-nostr.question: Nostr chii?
answer: Nostr inetiweki yakavhurika apo **iwe** uri muridzi weakaundi yako, kwete kambani. Hunhu hwako kiyi yekrptiografi yaunodzora, kwete zita remushandisi paseva yemumwe munhu.

Pa{{appName}}, kiyi yakafanana iyoyo ndiyo zvakare inotorwa kero yako yechipo — kiyi yako yakavanzika yeNostr (nsec) inopa mbeu kuwalleti yako yeBitcoin, ndocho chikonzero unogona kugashira Bitcoin pasina kunyoresa chero kwaani.

why-login-different.question: Sei kupinda kwangu kwakasiyana uye kurefu zvakadai?
answer: Panzvimbo pezita remushandisi nemupasiwedhi yakadzorwa nekambani, Nostr inoshandisa peya yemakiyi ekriptiografi.
"Kiyi yako yepachena" (inotanga ne**npub**) izita rako remushandisi. "Kiyi yako yakavanzika" (inotanga ne**nsec**) ipasiwedhi yako. Tambo refu ndiyo inoita kuti iyi isagona kufungidzirwa zvakananga.

lose-secret-key.question: Chii chinoitika kana ndikarasa kiyi yangu yakavanzika?
answer: **Hapana bhatani re"wakanganwa pasiwedhi".** Hapana anogona kuyiseta zvekare kwauri. Kana wairasa, akaundi yako — uye chero Bitcoin iri pakero yako yechipo — yaperera nokusingaperi.
**Chengeta kiyi yako yakavanzika kunzvimbo yakachengeteka iye zvino.** Kuti uone mazano, verenga [Kutarisira Makey ako eNostr](https://soapbox.pub/blog/managing-nostr-keys).

manage-secret-key.question: Ndinogona here kuchengeta kiyi yangu yakavanzika muchengeti yemapasiwedhi yefoni yangu?
answer: Hongu. Unogona kuyichengeta muchengeti yemapasiwedhi yedhivhaisi yako (iCloud Keychain, 1Password, Bitwarden, n.z.v.). PaiPhone, kuyichengeta muPasswords kunokupa mukana wekushandisa Face ID kana Touch ID kupinda.
Kuti uwane bhuku rakazara, ona [Kutarisira Makey ako eNostr](https://soapbox.pub/blog/managing-nostr-keys).

send-bitcoin-lightning.question: Kutumira Bitcoin neLightning kunoshanda sei?
answer: Kana mugashiri aine kero yeLightning papurofiri yake, unogona kutumira kuiyoyo. Lightning inopedza mumaminetiisi mashomanana uye mari yebasa idiki.

Kutumira kweLightning hakushandisi kero yechipo ye{{appName}} — kunoenda zvakananga kuwalleti yeLightning ipi zvayo yakagadzirwa nemugashiri ega. Mafambisirwo echipo che{{appName}} pachayo zviri on-chain chete.

what-are-zaps.question: MaZaps chii?
answer: MaZaps imari shoma yekutsigira yeLightning paNostr, yakasiyana nemafambisirwo echipo che{{appName}} on-chain.

fyp.question: Feed inoshanda sei?
answer: Feed yako inoratidza makambeni nemaposts kubva kuvanhu vaunotevera. Hapana algorithm inosarudza zvaunoona.

what-are-relays.question: MaRelays chii?
answer: MaRelays ndiwo maseva anochengeta uye anodelivha zviitiko zveNostr — maposts, marisiti echipo, ruzivo rwepurofiri. Zvirongwa zvepiyasi zvinoshanda kubva pakutanga; unogona kuwedzera kana kubvisa relays muSettings > Network.

what-are-blossom.question: MaServers eBlossom chii?
answer: MaServers eBlossom anochengeta mafaira emedia (mafananidzo emakambeni, mafananidzo emapurofiri) paunoaupload. Unogona kutarisira maservers aunoshandisa muSettings > Network.

report-content.question: Ndingareporta sei zvinhu zvinokuvadza?
answer: Vhura menu yemadhoti matatu (**...**) papost ipi zvayo wosarudza "Report." Unogona kuchamira kana kuvharira vashandisi kubva kumenu rimwechetero.

vs-mastodon-bluesky.question: Nostr yakasiyana sei neMastodon kana Bluesky?
answer: PaMastodon, akaundi yako iri paseva yakanyanyowa. PaBluesky, mamwe maakaundi anotsamira pakambani imwechete. PaNostr, hunhu hwako ikey yaunodzora, uye kero yako yechipo inoenda newe kuapp ipi zveNostr.

profile-fields.question: Magedhi epurofiri chii?
answer: Magedhi epurofiri anokupa mukana wekuwedzera ruzivo runonyatso pakupurofiri yako — masaini, makero emawalleti, mhumhutsi, mifananidzo, mavhidhio.

whatYouSee.label: Zvauunoona
whatYouSee.public: Kero yeBitcoin yakajairika yaunogona kubhadhara kubva chero kupi.
whatYouSee.silent: QR imwechete. Walleti yako inotora endpoint yakanyarara kana inotsigira BIP-352.

walletSupport.label: Rutsigiro rwemaWalleti
walletSupport.public: Walleti yose yeBitcoin. Cash App, Coinbase, Strike, hardware, chero chii zvacho.
walletSupport.silent: MaWalleti mashomanana nhasi. Mazhinji anodzokera kuchibvumirano cheBitcoin chakajairika.

privacy.label: Kuvanzika kwechipo
privacy.public: Pachena pa-chain. Kero yako yekutumira inobatanidzwa zvachose kukambeni.
privacy.silent: Rutivi rwekugashira haruna kubatana pa-chain. Tsoka yewalleti yako yekutumira ichiri pachena.

settlement.label: Kupedzwa
settlement.silent: Zvichaonekedzwa zvimwechete pa-chain, asi mugamuchiri anofanira kuscan walleti yake kuti aione.

whatDonorsSee.label: Zvinoonekwa nevapi
whatDonorsSee.public: Kero yeBitcoin yakajairika. Inoshanda nemawalleti ose pasi rose.
whatDonorsSee.silent: Endpoint yeBIP-352. MaWalleti evapi anoda rutsigiro rwemibhadharo yakanyarara; kana kusiri kudaro chipo chinodzokera kuchibvumirano cheBitcoin chakajairika.

receivingSpeed.label: Mwero wekugashira
receivingSpeed.public: Push-style. Zvipo zvinooneka pakarepo papeji yekambeni.
receivingSpeed.silent: Kuscana neruoko. Walleti yako inofanira kufamba pabhirochaina ichizvitsvaga. Maminetiisi kusvika kumaawa, zvichienderana newalleti.

pushNotifications.label: Zviziviso zvePush
pushNotifications.public: Hongu. Unoona zvipo zvitsva pakarepo zvinosvika.
pushNotifications.silent: Aiwa. Vhura walleti uye chitange kuscana kuti uzvione.

donorList.label: Runyorwa rwevapi / huwandu hwekambeni
donorList.public: Pachena nokusingaperi. Huwandu nemakero ekutumira zvinoonekwa kuna ani naani.
donorList.silent: Zvakavanzika. Peji yekambeni haigone kuratidza huwandu kana mihoro yezvipo zvemibhadharo yakanyarara.

ecosystem.label: Kukura kweEcosystem
ecosystem.silent: Yemberi. MaWalleti achine mabug; tarisira mibhadharo yakakuvara inozoonekwa pakuscana kunotevera.

bestFor.label: Zvinokwana zvakanyanya
bestFor.public: Kuunganidza mari kwepachena uko humbowo huzhinji nekuonekwa zvinobatsira.
bestFor.silent: Makambeni umo kuvanzika kwemupi kana mugamuchiri kwakakosha kupfuura huwandu hunoonekwa.

watchOutFor.label: Ngwarira
watchOutFor.public: Rekodhi yepachena yenguva yose yemupi mumwe nemumwe.
watchOutFor.silent: UX isina kunaka nhasi. Zvimwe zvipo hazvioneki kusvikira mugamuchiri ascana.

tldr.lede: Bhadhara kero yeBitcoin iri papeji yekambeni kubva muwalleti ipi zvayo yawatova nayo. Kana kambeni ichigamuchira mibhadharo yakanyarara uye walleti yako inotsigira, chipo chako chinova chakavanzika zvichizvichaira.
nextActions: Bhadhara kubva muwalleti yeBitcoin ipi zvayo

openCampaign.title: Vhura kambeni
openCampaign.body: Unoona QR imwechete. Kana kambeni ichigamuchira zvese, inonyora endpoints mbiri; walleti yako inotora yakakodzera.

payFromAnyWallet.title: Bhadhara nemawalleti ipi zvayo
payFromAnyWallet.body: Cash App, Coinbase, Strike, walleti yehardware, chero chii. Bhadhara mari nemari yenetiweki.

arrivesDirectly.title: Inosvika zvakananga
arrivesDirectly.body: Mari inoenda zvakananga kumugamuchiri. {{appName}} haina kana kubata kana kuviga, uye kero inotorwa kubva kukiyi yakavanzika yeNostr yemugamuchiri.

comparison.footnote: Makambeni anogona kugamuchira yePachena chete, Yakanyarara chete, kana zvese. Kana zvese, QR yacho inotakura endpoints mbiri. Walleti yako inotora iyo yainogona kushandisa.

publicVisible.title: Zvipo zvepachena zvinooneka pa-chain nokusingaperi
publicVisible.body: Chipo che**Pachena** chinosvika pakero yeBitcoin yakajairika yakabatana nekambeni. Munhu wese anogona kutsvaga kero yacho oona mari, nguva, uye kero yako yekutumira. Zvipo **Zvakanyarara** zvinopedzwa pa-chain zvakare, asi rutivi rwekugashira haruna kubatana nekambeni saka zvinosara kunze kwezvinyorwa zvevapi nemihoro yepachena.

privacy.heading: Kupa chipo chakavanzika
privacy.intro: Aya matanho akakosha kunyanya kuzvipo **Zvepachena**, apo chibvumirano chega chega chakasungwa zvachose kukero imwe. Zvipo **Zvakanyarara** zvinotovanza rutivi rwekugashira, saka njodzi yacho yakaderera. Kuongorora kunonyanya kweWalleti yako yekutumira kuchiri kuchikwanisika nzira dzese mbiri, saka kana njodzi yako iri pamusoro, aya matanho akakodzera. Sarudza imwe, kana wakomburiine.

silentWallet.name: Shandisa walleti yemibhadharo yakanyarara
silentWallet.purpose: Bhadhara newalleti yeBitcoin inotsigira BIP-352. Kana kambeni ichigamuchira mibhadharo yakanyarara, walleti yako inoshandisa endpoint iyoyo zvichizvichaira.

nonKyc.name: Tenga Bitcoin isiri yeKYC
nonKyc.purpose: Tenga Bitcoin peer-to-peer kuti isabatanidzwa nechitupa chako chemubatanidzwi kubva pakutanga. Pekutanga pakuvanzika pakanyanya kusimba.

coinjoin.name: Ita Coinjoin kutanga
coinjoin.purpose: Sanganisa Bitcoin yako nemari yevamwe vanhu kuti zvinobuda zvisakwanise kutevedzerwa kushopu yako yeKYC. Inobatsira apo kambeni inogamuchira yepachena chete.

freshWallet.name: Shandisa walleti nyowani
freshWallet.purpose: Ipa chipo kubva muwalleti isina kumbobata hunhu hwako hwepamusoro kana exchange yeKYC.

consumerApps.title: Maapp emumusha haakwanise kukuita usingazivikanwe
consumerApps.body: Cash App, Coinbase, Strike, Venmo, Kraken, Binance, naPayPal zvese zvinosimbisa hunhu hwako. Zvisinei kuti unotumira chipo sei, chibvumirano chega chega chinoramba chakasungwa nehunhu hwako chaihwo. Shandisa walleti isinochengetwa yaunodzora pachako.

silentToday.heading: Chinyorwa nezvemibhadharo yakanyarara nhasi
paragraphs: Mibhadharo yakanyarara ndiyo nzira yakavanzika kwazvo yokugashira Bitcoin pa-chain, asi ecosystem ichiri pwere. MaWalleti akakurumbira mazhinji haasati achikwanisa kutumira ku-endpoint yemibhadharo yakanyarara, saka kana walleti isingakwanisi, chipo chinodzokera kuchibvumirano cheBitcoin chakajairika kukero yepachena yekambeni (kana kambeni ichigamuchira zvese).

Kuvagamuchiri, zvipo zvemibhadharo yakanyarara zvinosvikawo pasina zviziviso zvePush uye zvinooneka chete mushure mekunge mugamuchiri ascana walleti yake, izvo zvinogona kutora maminetiisi kusvika maawa. Hapana ne hatomwe pazvinhu izvi inopiwa kubva kuchengeteka kwemari yako; inongoita zvekuita netarisiro.

tldr.lede: Sarudza zvaunogamuchira paunogadzira kambeni: Pachena, Yakanyarara, kana zvese. Zvese hazvichengetwe. {{appName}} haichengete mari yako nekupi.

howReceiving.heading: Kugashira kunoshanda sei
paragraphs: Makero ako ezvipo paWalleti ye{{appName}} anotorwa kubva kukiyi yako yakavanzika yeNostr (nsec) — kiyi imwechete yaunoshandisa kupinda ndiyo inopa mbeu kuwalleti yako yeBitcoin. Paunogadzira kambeni, unosarudza zvauunogamuchira:
**Mibhadharo yepachena chete.** Kero yeBitcoin yakajairika. Inooneka kune munhu wese, inoshanda nemawalleti ose.

**Mibhadharo yakanyarara chete.** Mibhadharo yakanyarara yeBIP-352. Rutivi rwekugashira haruna kubatana pa-chain, saka zvipo zvinosara kunze kwezvinyorwa zvevapi nemihoro yepachena. Vapi vanoda walleti inokwanisa mibhadharo yakanyarara kuti vatumire. Kana vasina, chipo chavo hachigone kupinda.

**Zvese.** {{appName}} inogadzira QR imwechete inonyora endpoints mbiri. MaWalleti emibhadharo yakanyarara anozviverenga sezvakavanzika; mawalleti akajairika anobhadhara kukero yepachena. Vapi havafaniri kusarudza.

Kugamuchira zvese kazhinji ndiyo sarudzo yakanaka: unowana zvipo zvakavanzika kubva kuvatsigiri vanoshandisa walleti yemibhadharo yakanyarara, uye unoramba wakavhurika kuvapi vane Bitcoin chete mu app yemumusha.

Mukati mewalleti yako ye{{appName}}, izvi zvinosvika se**huwandu huviri hwakaparadzana** — chitabu che**Pachena** (kero yako yeBitcoin yakajairika) nechitabu che**Yakavanzika** (mibhadharo yakanyarara) — zvinoratidzwa pamatabu ePachena / Yakavanzika ewalleti. {{appName}} inozvichengeta zvakaparadzana nemaune: huwandu huviri uhu hahungatombo shandiswi pamwechete. Kusanganisa mari yakavanzika neyepachena mumushando mumwechete kungabatanidza zvipo zvako zvemibhadharo yakanyarara zvisingabatanidziki kudzokera kukero yako yepachena pa-chain uye zvoparadza kuvanzika kwazviripo kupa.

whatEveryoneSees.heading: Zvinoonekwa nemunhu wese
paragraphs: Kana kambeni yako ichigamuchira mibhadharo yepachena, ani nani ari kufunga kukutsigira anogona kutsvaga kero yacho oona nhoroondo yezvipo zvepachena.

Zvipo zvemibhadharo yakanyarara hazvisi chikamu cherekodhi iyoyo. Hazvionekwe kune vatariri vekunze uye hazvioneki muzvionekwa zvepachena zvekambeni; vapi vatsva vanongoona zvauinotumira pamusoro pemafambiro ekambeni.

comparison.footnote: Haukwanise kuchinja zvinosarudzwa zvemubhadharo zvinogamuchirwa nekambeni mushure mekugadzirwa kwayo. Kana ukachinja pfungwa, gadzira kambeni nyowani.

silentToday.heading: Chinyorwa nezvemibhadharo yakanyarara nhasi
paragraphs: Mibhadharo yakanyarara ndiyo nzira yakavanzika kwazvo yokugashira Bitcoin pa-chain, asi ecosystem ichiri pwere. MaWalleti akakurumbira mazhinji haasati achikwanisa kutumira ku-endpoint yemibhadharo yakanyarara, saka kana walleti yemupi isingakwanisi, chipo chinodzokera kuchibvumirano cheBitcoin chakajairika kukero yako yepachena (kana uchigamuchira zvese).

Zvipo zvemibhadharo yakanyarara zvinosvikawo pasina zviziviso zvePush uye zvinooneka chete mushure mekunge wascana walleti yako, izvo zvinogona kutora maminetiisi kusvika maawa. Hapana ne hatomwe pazvinhu izvi inopiwa kubva kuchengeteka kwemari yako; inongoita zvekuita netarisiro yezuva nezuva.

twoWallets.title: Chengeta huwandu hwako hwePachena nehweYakavanzika hwakaparadzana
twoWallets.body: Walleti yako ye{{appName}} inoratidza matabu maviri: **Pachena** (kero yako yeBitcoin yakajairika) ne**Yakavanzika** (mibhadharo yakanyarara). Anochengetwa akaparadzana zvachose, uye huwandu huviri uhu hahungatombo shandiswi mumushando mumwechete — kuparadzana ikoko ndiko kunochengeta zvipo zvako zvakavanzika zvisingabatanidziki. Paunokwidza mari kubva muchitabu che**Yakavanzika**, tumira kukero yemibhadharo yakanyarara (**sp1…**), iyo inoramba yakavanzika. Kana panzvimbo pacho ukatumira mari yakavanzika kukero yepa-chain isina chinhu, {{appName}} inoiongorora: kana kero yacho yakamboshandiswa, kana iri yewalleti yako yepachena, inokuyambira uye inokuita kuti udzvanye **Tumira zvakadaro**, nekuti kuita izvozvo kunobatanidza mari yako yakavanzika kunhoroondo yepachena yekero iyoyo. Kutumira kukero ye**sp1…** hakumboita kuti yambiro iyi ibude.

sweep.title: Tora kuwalleti yaunozvidzora
sweep.body: Walleti yako ye{{appName}} yatova inozvichengeta — iwe, uye iwe chete, ndiwe unodzora makiyi. Kuti uone bharanzi imwechete uchishandisa walleti yedesktop kana yehardware, vhura menyu yewalleti, sarudza **Chengetedza chikwama**, wogopinza mutsara weseed wemazwi makumi maviri nemana muna [Sparrow](https://sparrowwallet.com), [BlueWallet](https://bluewallet.io), kana muwalleti yehardware (Trezor, Ledger). Kana uchida kufambisa mari kukiyi yakasiyana zvachose — semuenzaniso, kuwalleti yeLightning se [Phoenix](https://phoenix.acinq.co) — tumira mushando weBitcoin wakajairika kubva muwalleti yako ye{{appName}}.

dontSit.title: Usagara nemari mubrowser
dontSit.body: Zvikuru kumakambeni ane mari yakawanda, chengeta mutsara weseed wewalleti panze (papepa, pasimbi, kana mu password manager pamuchina wakatsaurirwa) uye funga nezve walleti yehardware. Seed yaunochengetedza kubva pa{{appName}} ndeyewalleti imwecheteyo — chengetedza mazwi uye watova nechechengeto yakatonhora (cold storage).

cashout.heading: Kukwidza mari nenzira yakavanzika
cashout.intro: Kushandisa mari pa-chain kunogadzira nzira yekutevera kunze kwekunge wamboibvuna kutanga. Kwidza mari kubva muchitabu che**Yakavanzika** kuti zvipo zvemibhadharo yakanyarara zvirambe zvisingabatanidziki — tanga watumira kuwalleti yemibhadharo yakanyarara (kero ye**sp1…**), wozoshandisa zvichitevera; kutsva uku kunobvuna chinongedzo pakati pekambeni yako neicho chinotevera. Usatumira mari yakavanzika kukero yakambodzokororwa kana yepachena, izvo zvinoibatanidza zvakare. Mamwe masarudzo apasi anoshanda zvakare uye ane kutarisana kwawo.

silentHop.name: Kufambisa kuwalleti yemibhadharo yakanyarara
silentHop.purpose: Fambisa zvipo zvako kuwalleti yemibhadharo yakanyarara ([Ditto Wallet](https://ditto.pub), [Dana](https://github.com/cygnet3/dana/releases/download/v0.7.4/app-live-release.apk)). Kubva ipapo, kushandisa kwako kunotevera hakuna kusungwa kukambeni.

lightningSwap.name: Kutsinhanisa neLightning
lightningSwap.purpose: Atomic-swap yeBitcoin yepa-chain kuLightning. Mibhadharo yeLightning haisviki kubhirochaina yepachena.

coinjoin.name: Coinjoin
coinjoin.purpose: Sanganisa Bitcoin yako nemari yevamwe vashandisi kuti chinobuda chisakwanise kubatanidzwa kuchinopinda.

peerToPeer.name: Peer-to-peer
peerToPeer.purpose: Tsinhanisa Bitcoin nefiat zvakananga neumwe munhu kana kuburikidza nebroker paBisq, HodlHodl, kana RoboSats.

spendDirectly.name: Ishandise zvakananga
spendDirectly.purpose: Tenga makadhi ezvipo (Amazon, Uber, zvokudya, kufamba) zvakananga kubva muBitcoin pasina kushandura kuva mari pakutanga.

tumblers.title: Nzvenga matumbler ane simba rekati
tumblers.body: Mavhukauto akachengeterwa anokwanisa kuba mari yako, kunyora kuti ndiani akatumira chii, kana kuva matsvuura emagumbo eaw. Shandisa kufambisa kwemibhadharo yakanyarara kana coinjoin isinochengetwa pachinzvimbo chacho.

walletDoubleTweak.seoDescription: Garisa mibhadharo yakanyararira yakasara pachain nokuda kwebug yekutumira yekare uye uitumire muchikwama chako.
walletDoubleTweak.title: Kugadzirisa SP yeDouble-tweak
walletDoubleTweak.heading: Garisa mibhadharo yakanyararira yakasara
walletDoubleTweak.subheading: Shanduro yekare yeAgora yakanyora mamwe maoutput emubhadharo wakanyararira pakiyi isiri iyo, saka haana kana kumboonekwa muchikwama chako. Chishandiso ichi chinoongorora chain zvakare kutsvaga maoutput iwayo uye chinotumira chero aanowana muchikwama chako.
walletDoubleTweak.loggedOut: Pinda nemuviri weNostr wakagamuchira mibhadharo yakanyararira kuti igone kugariswa.

unsupported.title: Chikwama hachiwanike
unsupported.description: Kugarisa kunoda chikwama chinogona kusaina panyangani. Pinda nensec yako kuti uenderere mberi.

noIndexer.title: Hapana muongorori wemubhadharo wakanyararira wakaiswa
noIndexer.description: URL yemuongorori weBIP-352 inodiwa kuti uongorore mibhadharo yakasara. Isa imwe mumarongero echikwama woedza zvakare.

scan.title: Ongorora mibhadharo yakasara
scan.description: Sarudza kureba kweblock kwekutangira kuongorora. Kugarisa kunotarisa block yega yega kubva ipapo kusvika kumusoro wechain.

noFunds.title: Hapana chokugarisa
noFunds.description: Hapana mibhadharo yakanyararira yakasara yakawanikwa muchikamu chakaongororwa. Edza kureba kwekutanga kwekutangira kana waitarisira mari.

found.title: Mibhadharo yakasara yawanikwa
found.description: Maoutput aya anogona kutumirwa zvakare muchikwama chako.

destination.title: Mari ichatumirwa kuna
destination.description: Kero itsva yokugamuchira muchikwama chako chazvino.

walletDoubleTweak.dontClose: Usavhare peji rino kusvika kugarisa kwapera.

errors.noDestination: Hapana kero yokutumira inowanikwa. Vhura chikwama chako kutanga.
errors.noBlockbook: Hapana server yeBlockbook yakaiswa. Isa imwe mumarongero echikwama.

walletDoubleTweak.footnote: Uku kutumira kwenzira imwe chete muchikwama chako chazvino. Mibhadharo yakanyararira yakakanganiswa chete ndiyo inobatwa; hapana chimwe chinochinja.
